description_long: This object is a sleek wristwatch with a black strap and a round, dark watch face. The strap appears to be made of leather or a similar material, with a metallic buckle at one end for fastening. The watch face is simple and unadorned, with no visible numerals or markers, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The case of the watch is slightly domed, and the lugs connecting the strap to the case are subtle and streamlined. The buckle is metallic and rectangular, contrasting with the otherwise dark color scheme. The overall design is understated, making it suitable for both casual and formal urban settings.
description: A minimalist black wristwatch with a round, dark face and a metallic buckle. The design is sleek and modern, with a simple strap and no visible dial markings.
description_view_0: The watch is seen from the end of the strap, highlighting the width of the strap and the round face.
description_view_1: A side profile shows the thinness of the watch case and the full length of the strap, including the metallic buckle.
description_view_2: The opposite end view emphasizes the strap's taper and the round face, with the buckle less visible.
description_view_3: Another side profile, mirroring view 1, with the buckle now on the opposite side.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is plain and dark with no visible numerals, indices, or decorative elements, presenting a minimalist style.
attribute_strap_type: Black leather strap with a smooth finish and a standard width, attached to a metallic buckle.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with no visible hands, numerals, or complications; the face is featureless and minimalist.
